facebook.caption:
Fresh seafood in Phu Quoc for $15-30 a person. That's it. That's the post.

Phuong Hoang Seafood Restaurant on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is pulling 4.5 stars across 1,860 reviews at those prices. The crowds show up for a reason.

Book your table before your resort upsells you a $60 lobster. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Grilled, steamed, fried. Phu Quoc seafood hitting every table at once. Phuong Hoang Seafood Restaurant. $15-30 per person. 4.5 stars. 1,860 people already know.
